LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. MORADI-SHALAL V FIREMEN'S INSURANCE CO. (1988) 46 CAL 3D 287 AND CEL-TECH COMMUNICATION, INC. V LOS ANGELES CELLULAR TELEPHONE CO. (1999) 20 CAL APP 4TH 163. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
